name: Switch
description: Boolean toggle. Off/On states with optional label + description. Maps to shadcn/ui Switch.
$matrixNote: 5 axes — twice the dimensional complexity of Button's 3-axis matrix. Stress-tests SP-1 exposedProps filtering + variantConstraints across more permutations. Bundle counts 64 cells = 2 × 2 × 4 × 2 × 2.

$missingStates.$comment: Apollo v2 Switch's state axis is 4 values (Default/Disabled/Focus/Invalid). Compare Button's 6 (Default/Hover/Focus/Loading/Disabled/Pressed).
$auditFindings: F5 (MEDIUM): Switch lacks Hover state — no mouse-hover visual feedback on track or thumb.
F6 (LOW): Switch lacks Pressed state — toggle interaction has no visible down-feedback.
F-7 (LOW): Switch lacks Loading state — no busy-async-toggle cue (Button has it via SP-5 swapDefaults; Switch could mirror).

exposedProps.name: descriptionText
exposedProps.description: Helper / description text below the label.

slots.name: track
slots.$role: The pill-shaped toggle background. Color changes by active + state.

default.$heightAuditFinding: F9 (MEDIUM): Track height 18.4px not bound to any token. Apollo v2 has no height/h-* at 18.4; closest is h-4 (16) or would need new h-4-5 (18). Source-DS audit candidate.

sm.$tbdReason: size=sm track height not yet walked. Likely smaller (~14px) given pattern.

slots.$borderPatternNote: Track has a 2px transparent border that acts as breathing room between thumb and track edge. Clever pattern; the thumb's effective travel range = (track-width − thumb-width − 2×border-spacing). Document so consumers don't strip the transparent border thinking it's a no-op.

slots.name: thumb
slots.$role: The round movable circle. Color stays consistent; position shifts on active.

default.$shape: square frame with rounded-full radius = effective circle

slots.$positionNote: Thumb position is animation-driven: at left edge of inner-track when active=Off, at right edge when active=On. Captured by SP-9 motion descriptor (see animations[] below).

typography.$comment: Typography varies by size axis. See bindings.size-axis.{size}.labelTypography for the authoritative value.

fill.$disabledNote: Disabled label color stays at base/foreground; the 50% opacity is applied at the OUTER container level, which dims the entire component including the label.
fill.$invalidNote: Invalid label fills to destructive. Confirmed via cell 21141:9448.
fill.$confirmed: Walked Default, Disabled, Focus, Invalid cells.

slots.name: description
slots.$typographyNote: Description typography is constant across size axis (unlike label).

fill.$invalidNote: Description STAYS muted on Invalid (does not shift to destructive). Inference in Step 2 was wrong — corrected here. Confirmed via cell 21141:9448.
fill.$confirmed: Walked Default, Disabled, Focus, Invalid cells.

container.$controlPlacementNote: controlPlacement=Start → track first, then Field Content. controlPlacement=End → Field Content first, then track. itemOrder flips.
container.$widthNote: Container width is FIXED at 312px (Type=Default) or 300px (Type=Box). Hardcoded, not bound. Audit signal.

track.$paddingNote: 1px raw, not from a spacing token. Source-DS audit: should be a fractional spacing token (no spacing/0-25 exists at 1px) OR removed in favor of border-2 transparent technique.

bindings.$comment: Switch has a richer per-axis-combination binding map than Button. Some properties depend on multiple axes (e.g. track fill = function of active + state).

radius.$comment: Track and thumb are universally pill-rounded. Box-type frame uses rounded-lg (10px).

Off.$confirmed: Walked cells 428:1425 (Default), 21141:13977 (Disabled), 17428:105516 (Focus), 21141:9448 (Invalid). Off track fill = input-dark-input-80 (#a3a3a3) across ALL state values. State changes Off track via border/shadow/opacity, not fill.

On.$confirmed: Walked cell 428:1431 (default/On/Default/Default/Start) → track fill = base/primary. Other On+state cells inferred from same Off pattern (state delta = border/shadow not fill); Invalid+On inferred from Invalid+Off (border=destructive, ring=focus-destructive) plus On semantics (fill=destructive instead of primary). Confirm in next round.

thumb-position.Off: flex-start (default; thumb at left edge of inner-track)
thumb-position.On: flex-end (thumb at right edge of inner-track)
thumb-position.$mechanism: Track is HORIZONTAL flex container with single child (thumb). justify-content shifts the child between flex-start (Off) and flex-end (On). No position-absolute / transform. Result: clean CSS, smart-animate-driven slide between the two layout endpoints.
thumb-position.$confirmed: Walked 428:1425 (Off → no justify class = default flex-start) + 428:1431 (On → justify-end class added).

Disabled.$role: same as Default; Disabled state changes opacity only

Focus.$role: Focus swaps the transparent border-2 for a 1px ring-colored border

Invalid.$role: Invalid swaps the transparent border-2 for a 1px destructive border

track-border.$confirmed: Walked 4 cells across state axis. Pattern: Default/Disabled = border-2 transparent; Focus = border-1 base/ring; Invalid = border-1 destructive.

track-shadow.$invalidNote: F11 (NEW finding, MEDIUM): Invalid state shows the destructive focus ring AT REST (always shown, not only on Focus). Likely intentional Apollo v2 design — emphasizes invalidness without requiring focus. Documented; not a bug. Verify if Focus+Invalid combo doubles the ring (likely just shows the destructive one).
track-shadow.$confirmed: Walked Focus (17428:105516) + Invalid (21141:9448) cells. Default/Disabled have no track shadow.

track-overflow.$comment: Focus + Invalid cells emit overflow-clip on the track. Likely to prevent the thumb from visually escaping the bordered track edge when the border thickness changes. Default/Disabled have no overflow set (visible default).

thumb-fill.$comment: Thumb stays #fafafa across all 64 cells. Travel changes by active; color does not.

focus-ring.$note: Equivalent to track-shadow above. Switch uses the same drop-shadow effect for both 'focus indication' and 'invalid indication'. Kept as separate key for parity with Button.component.json schema; consumers should treat track-shadow as authoritative.

opacity.$appliedAt: outer <button> container — affects entire component (track + thumb + label + description) uniformly
opacity.$disabledNote: F8 (CONFIRMED, MEDIUM): Switch applies opacity-50 at the OUTER button container for Disabled. Button uses tinted color (no alpha) for Disabled. Cross-component DS inconsistency. Recommend standardizing.
opacity.$confirmed: Walked cell 21141:13977 (default/Off/Disabled/Default/Start) — opacity-50 class on outer container; track/thumb/label/description otherwise unchanged from Default.

default.$trackHeightAuditFinding: F9 (MEDIUM): 18.4px not bound. No token at this value. Source-DS audit: add height/h-4-5 (18px) OR document the 18.4 fraction as intentional.

sm.$trackHeightAuditFinding: F10 (NEW, MEDIUM): 14px not bound. Parallel to F9 — Apollo v2 has no height/h-* at 14. Either add height/h-3-5 OR snap to h-3 (12).
sm.$thumbNote: Cell 21136:10697 emits raw 12px (size-[12px]) not via {width.w-3} token. Matches the numeric value but cell-level binding absent. Source-DS audit: explicit bind.
sm.$labelTypographyNote: Surprise: sm uses leading-NONE (line-height: 1) variant; default uses leading-normal (line-height: 20). Apollo v2 packed sm tighter.
sm.$descriptionTypographyNote: Description typography unchanged across sizes (always leading-normal-normal).

Default.$role: Compact inline layout — label + description next to a bare track. No frame around the component.
Default.$confirmed: Walked cells 428:1425, 428:1431, 21141:9448, 21141:13977, 17428:105516, 21136:10697 — all Type=Default. Width 312/304 hardcoded across all of them.

Box.$role: Boxed layout — label + description + track inside a bordered container. For form-field placement parity.
Box.$paddingCorrection: Step 2 inferred spacing/3 (12px); cell walk shows spacing/2-5 (10px). Correction applied.

controlPlacement-axis.$role: Layout-only — flips item order in the horizontal container. No visual identity change.

transition.$tbdStep5: Prototype interaction not yet walked. Estimated duration/easing per Apollo v2 motion taste (150-300ms ease-out per Button audit layer 2). Confirm via prototype.json extraction in Step 5.

animations.$animationDescription: Thumb slides horizontally from left edge to right edge of inner-track. Concurrent: track fill transitions from input-dark-input-80 (gray) → base/primary (violet) — or base/destructive on Invalid.

motionReduce.$reason: SP-9 v0.3.0: state-transition animations like Switch toggle should use `skip` policy under prefers-reduced-motion. Reduced-motion users see Off → On as an instant variant change (no slide). Slowing the slide to 4s (Spinner-style) would feel laggy. Freezing would lose information. `skip` preserves the state change while removing the motion.

touchTargetCompliance.$auditFinding: 32 of 64 cells (all Type=Default) fail WCAG 2.5.5. Type=Box meets it. Documented signal; not a bundle blocker. Recommend Type=Box for primary touch surfaces.

ariaInvalid.$comment: Switch in Invalid state should emit aria-invalid="true". Apollo v2 should pair the visual Invalid state with this ARIA attribute.

candidates.$note: shadcn Switch has variant=on/off mapped via `checked` prop; size axis not in shadcn baseline (Apollo v2 adds `sm` size). Type=Box also Apollo-specific.

$step1_token_findings: 39 tokens used; 17 NEW vs Button bundle (w-8, h-3, border-2, rounded-lg, font-weight/normal, 3 typography compounds, spacing/2-5 + spacing/3, opacity-50, base/foreground/border/ring, 3 custom alpha colors).
Switch uses opacity-50 for Disabled — Button uses tinted color. Cross-component DS inconsistency (Finding 8 candidate).

$step2_known_gaps.field: Track height 18.4px raw, no token binding (Finding 9 candidate)
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: OPEN — surfaced as F9 (MEDIUM). Source-DS audit: add height/h-4-5 (18px) token OR document raw 18.4 as intentional.

$step2_known_gaps.field: size=sm track height not yet walked
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CLOSED (Step 3, cell 21136:10697). sm track = 14px raw. New finding F10 (MEDIUM): also unbound.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Type=Box cell details (padding-y, per-state border behavior)
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CLOSED (Step 3, cell 17119:18448). Box padding = spacing/2-5 (10px, NOT spacing/3 12px as inferred). Container border + radius + fill confirmed.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Animation timing (duration + easing) on toggle transition
Per-state track-fill for On + state combinations
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: PARTIAL — cell 428:1431 (On/Default) confirms primary fill. On+Disabled/Focus/Invalid inferred (state delta = border/shadow not fill, mirroring Off pattern); confirm in next round.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Container fixed widths (312/304/300/296) raw, not bound
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CONFIRMED hardcoded across all 6 walked cells. Source-DS audit candidate (parallel to Button's F2). Not a bundle blocker.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Active=On track justify-end behavior — is it intentional layout vs CHANGE_VARIANT-driven repositioning?
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CLOSED — Step 3 walk of cells 428:1425 (Off) + 428:1431 (On) shows the mechanism: justify-content shifts between flex-start and flex-end. Captured in bindings.thumb-position.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Invalid state shows destructive ring at REST, not only on Focus
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: DOCUMENTED — F11 (NEW, MEDIUM): Invalid state's focus-destructive drop-shadow appears always. Apollo v2 intentional emphasis. Captured in bindings.track-shadow.Invalid.

$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F8: CONFIRMED at cell level. Switch uses opacity-50 at outer container for Disabled; Button uses tinted color. DS-wide inconsistency.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F9: CONFIRMED at cell level. Default-size track height 18.4px raw.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F10: NEW. sm-size track height 14px raw. Parallel to F9.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F11: NEW. Invalid state shows destructive focus ring at rest. Not a bug — apparently intentional Apollo v2 design — documented for downstream consumers.

v0.2.0: SP-1 — whenVariant/whenSize filters not yet exercised (Switch slots labelText + descriptionText apply to all variants; no axis-conditional suppression)
SP-2 — variantConstraints empty array (no axis combinations forbidden)
SP-3 — n/a (no textDecoration usage in Switch)
SP-4 — $bindingStatus: hardcoded fires on track height (18.4px), container widths, padding-x: 1px
SP-6 — codeConnect URL not yet verified (only 1 doc link)
SP-7 — Per-side padding + clipsContent: pending Step 3 walk (Type=Default has no padding so trivially fine; Type=Box has spacing/3 padding)
SP-8 — Nested-instance tokens: nothing nested at this depth (track + thumb are direct children, not INSTANCE refs)
v0.3.0: SP-4 extension — semantically-mismatched: not observed in Switch (no cross-axis token use yet)

SP-9 — APPLIED to animations[0].motionReduce. Toggle uses policy=skip (state-transition animation, not looping). Validates SP-9 policy enum across both `slow` (Button Spinner) and `skip` (Switch toggle).
